I build systems that learn — from fine-tuning vision models on CULane to data infrastructure that ships real cargo. Hard problems at the edge of ML and systems.

PyTorch · Computer Vision · Transformers · SQL / ETL · Kubernetes · HuggingFace · Grad-CAM · FastAPI · Apache Superset · XGBoost · DigitalOcean · React · PyTorch · Computer Vision · Transformers · SQL / ETL · Kubernetes · HuggingFace · Grad-CAM · FastAPI · Apache Superset · XGBoost · DigitalOcean · React ·

SELECTED WORK

NLP for Customer Support

BERT sentiment + BERTopic topic modeling on telecom call transcripts to surface complaint themes and coaching opportunities.

NLPTopic Modeling
↗

Question Answering with Transformers

Interactive QA system on custom context using deepset/roberta-base-squad2; deployed on AWS with CUDA optimization.

NLPLLMBackend
↗

CLRNet Lane Detection — Failure Analysis

Scenario-based failure analysis of CLRNet across 10 driving conditions on CULane. Grad-CAM interpretability, CLAHE night augmentation, and TTA experiments on a ResNet18 backbone.

PyTorchComputer VisionGrad-CAMResNet18CULane
↗

Analytics Warehouse & Superset Dashboards

Built analytics_production from scratch on top of a 71-table MySQL production database. Deployed Apache Superset 5.0 on Kubernetes with embedded dashboards, Spring Boot guest tokens, and an AI chat widget.

SQLApache SupersetKubernetesHelmDigitalOceanSpring Boot
↗

Online Retail Customer Intelligence Study

Segmentation, association rules, and Holt–Winters forecasting on the UCI Online Retail II dataset with Tableau dashboards.

AnalyticsForecastingDashboards
↗

Multimodal VQA for Visual Accessibility

Built a multimodal VQA pipeline on the VizWiz dataset — images taken by blind users paired with spoken questions. Fine-tuned vision-language models to improve accessibility outcomes across three challenge tracks.

PyTorchVQAHuggingFaceBLIP-2Accessibility
↗

RECENT NEWS

May 2025 Research

Completed scenario-based failure analysis of CLRNet across 10 driving conditions on CULane. Grad-CAM visualizations on layer4, CLAHE augmentation for night recovery, TTA experiments. Final project for CSCI 5922 (Neural Networks) at CU Boulder.

Mar 2025 Work

Deployed Apache Superset 5.0 on DigitalOcean Kubernetes — white-labeled, embedded dashboards with Spring Boot guest token backend, and an agentic AI chat widget using the OpenAI API for logistics analytics.

Jan 2025 Work

Built and shipped the Time of Day Report at Ascend Cargo — first output of the new analytics_production data warehouse, showing average dwell time per warehouse location by hourly time slot across the 71-table MySQL schema.

Jan 2025 Education

Graduated with a dual Master's degree in Business Analytics and Cybersecurity from Virginia Tech with a 3.97/4.00 CGPA. Starting MS in Computer Science at CU Boulder.
